note: Deploy 0575f3a (2026-04-28): mobile scroll unlock, morph finalization defer, iOS video icon fix, dvh→lvh. Tests skipped by user.

entries.description: Core smoke — modules loaded, DOM present, Barba transitions, nav links
WCAG 2.1 AA — axe-core, aria-hidden, keyboard focus, reduced motion
Pipeline canary — staging URL configured, site loads, no critical errors
Case video controls — progress bar, viewport auto-pause, auto-hide, Barba cleanup
About page team member hover — scale, directional shift, tap toggle, Barba re-entry
Case page title entrance animation — SplitText, Barba re-entry, reduced motion
GSAP Flip-based about transition — logo reparenting, overlay, re-entry, direct land
Video buffering UX — spinner on FG/work videos, BG/FG sync, Barba cleanup
Lottie video loading spinner — visibility, CSS, reduced motion fallback, Barba cleanup
Memory leak regression — video count bounded, dial canvas, rapid navigation survival
Case transition polish — FG video gap, scroll reset, opacity, rapid multi-cycle
Mobile homepage — dial sizing, white dot visibility, case bottom nav, Barba at 390px
Mobile scroll-linked team bio reveal — scroll triggers, reverse, direction, console errors, desktop regression, Barba re-entry, reduced motion
Dial namespace selectors — data-dial-ns attribute + display:grid on all pages and Barba transitions
Mobile about hero — scroll-driven logo animation, sticky logo, bell-curve per third, Barba re-entry
Dev/CDN source switch — localStorage toggle via URL param, console indicator, graceful localhost failure
About team scroll reveal — per-element ScrollTrigger scrub, translateX+opacity, scale, reverse, desktop hover regression, Barba re-entry, reduced motion
FG video preload on case→home transition — cleanup, readyState, no accumulation, reduced motion
Mobile autoplay fallback — tap-to-play homepage, persistent case controls, SVG overlay, viewport auto-pause/resume
Homepage step text — ScrambleText to active project name on dial ACTIVE, revert to original on IDLE, reduced motion fallback, Barba re-entry

Home intro section + 100vh scroll-driven cloned-logo morph to nav + dial small→large + scroll lock + Barba skip intro + about slide transitions + nav logo replay + reduced motion + mobile 375px sticky slot + defensive CSS scoping on about/case + about-hero logo animations removed
Work page prev/next navigation — hrefs populated from CMS list, cyclic wrapping on first/last, Barba case→case navigation, re-entry correctness
Guards against [data-wf-item-slug] on <html> being stale after Barba case→case transitions; asserts prev/next hrefs reflect the new current page using location.pathname

Homepage dial bumped to 63svh on short-viewport desktops (1440-1990 wide, ≤849 tall); step text 'Great stories made undeniable' is ~438.55px (letter-spacing 5.63px), 63svh gives 504px dial at 1440×800 (~87% fill); unchanged at 1440×900 and 1920×1080; Barba round-trip preserved

Homepage intro refined — dial locked idle at .home_dial-start (small, no fg video, step text hidden, intro logo fades in), GSAP Flip.fit scrubbed morph over 100vh to .home_dial-middle + .nav_logo-wrapper-2.is-nav, .rhp-home-ready toggle replaces _animateNavIn, step text reveal via RHP.homeIntro.revealStep, Barba re-entry skip, reduced motion fast-path
Video overlays — 45% BG ::after on all namespaces, 15% FG ::after on home only, GSAP custom prop fade during Barba transitions, reduced motion
Dial engaged mode disables tick lengthening, dynamic sector count from CMS items, proportional FLAT_TICKS

Homepage intro scroll choreography — large logo + small transition dial animate via GSAP Flip.fit scrubbed by ScrollTrigger, morph complete swaps to work-dial, nav animate-in, scroll lock, Barba re-entry skip, replay on nav logo click, reduced motion
FG video src update on case→case Barba nav — src matches new page, autoplay, no console errors, direct-land regression, home→case regression, multi-nav cycle
FG overlay 15% black — fade out on home→work, stay hidden on work, fade in on work→home, reduced motion instant
Controlled video sections autoplay after Barba transition — home→work, about→work, direct-load regression, no console errors
Mobile home intro — fg hidden on load, 250svh section, logo fade-out, auto-engage ACTIVE, dial position, bg canvas visibility, desktop regression
About slider auto-height — MutationObserver on .about-slider .w-slide, height update on slide change, Barba re-entry, no console errors
About page scroll accordions — ScrollTrigger open/close at 35% from bottom, height auto, reverse on scroll-back, multiple open, Barba re-entry, reduced motion
About page icon viewport fill — CSS var sizing, viewport fit, module registration, Barba re-entry, responsive, reduced motion
About entrance curtain — fullscreen overlay slide-in, SplitText content reveal, re-entry cycle, reduced motion, work→about path
Mobile home intro — 300svh section, word reveal over 250svh, logo shrink+translate to nav over last 50svh, desktop regression, reduced motion, Barba re-entry
FG video transition flash — opacity gap after clearProps on work→home, video teardown on work→work, rAF monitoring for flash detection
Dial tick centering — fgWrap-derived center, center drift self-healing, Barba round-trip, mobile 375px, reduced motion
iOS mobile dial — no video ? icon, fg-video visibility gate, height freeze with visualViewport re-freeze, Barba re-entry, desktop regression
About slider autoheight timing fix + R icon FOUC guard + direct-load content reveal + about→home fade-out
